name: PacketStream
description: PacketStream Reseller API for account balance, residential-proxy sub-users, usage transactions, proxy auth rotation, and balance allocation. Requires separate Reseller API approval and token; normal PacketStream buyer credentials do not authorize this API.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: Reseller API token
credential_fields.description: PacketStream Reseller API bearer token. Request access at packetstream.io/dashboard/reseller_api.

tools.name: get_reseller_account
tools.description: Get reseller account information and balance. Monetary balances are returned in USD cents.

tools.name: create_sub_user
tools.description: Create a PacketStream sub-user. PacketStream charges a small anti-abuse fee for each creation, so list users first and do not retry a successful call.

tools.name: list_sub_users
tools.description: List all sub-users owned by the reseller. Balances are in USD cents.

tools.name: get_sub_user
tools.description: Get one sub-user by username, including current balance and proxy auth information returned by PacketStream.

tools.name: get_sub_user_transactions
tools.description: Get a sub-user's transaction and bandwidth history. Bandwidth values are measured in bytes.

tools.name: reset_sub_user_auth_key
tools.description: Rotate a sub-user's proxy authentication key. The old key stops working; securely retain the new key returned by this call.

tools.name: give_sub_user_balance
tools.description: Transfer balance from the reseller account to a sub-user. amount_usd_cents is an integer number of US cents and changes spendable balance.

tools.name: take_sub_user_balance
tools.description: Return balance from a sub-user to the reseller account. amount_usd_cents is an integer number of US cents.
